schema.description: Create a Jira incident from a structured, PII-gated ticket. Off by default: requires jira.enable_write in the plugin config AND the JIRA_API_TOKEN credential, and every call is approval-escalated. All outbound text is PII-redacted; any referenced evidence file must pass the validate_no_pii gate (clean and complete) or the call refuses.
schema.name: jira_create_incident

evidence_paths.description: Local evidence files referenced by this ticket; each must pass the PII gate before anything is sent.

labels.description: Optional labels to set on the issue.

severity.description: Optional severity note (recorded in the description).
